Title: AirPods Serial Number Check - Verify Authenticity | IMEIcheck.net

URL Source: https://imeicheck.net/brands/airpods-serial-number

Markdown Content:
![Image 1: firstBlock](https://imeicheck.net/images/brands/AirPods/airpods-d.png)

The serial number of your AirPods shows whether the device is original or not. Moreover, it reveals essential additional data. For instance, you can use this number to discover your AirPods insurance information by entering the S/N on a special online service. In this article, we will tell you three ways to find out this important AirPods identifier in less than a minute.

## Example of AirPods Serial Number check result:

Full name of the device

Apple AirPods Pro (2nd generation)

*   100% available device information
*   Black list status
*   Unlimited checks The number of paid checks is not limited by the system. You can do a huge number of paid checks per day by paying for each check individually (each device ID check is paid separately)

*   High processing priority
*   No registration required
*   Extended support
*   Card payments 

*   1 On the box

One of the easiest ways to find the serial number of your AirPods is to look at the packaging. Typically, the AirPods manufacturer places it on the box next to the barcode and on the receipt as well. The text may be small, but you will definitely find it right near the “Serial No” marking. This method only works if you bought the new product in a store, and you will not be able to use it if you bought second-hand AirPods. 
*   2 Printed on the AirPods

Not all users know that the serial number is printed on the Airpod itself and on the charging case. Take a closer look at the left earbud, and you will see a small print under the left ear cushion. The number is also indicated under the AirPods case lid. Look carefully, as the letters are really tiny. 
*   3 Using another Apple device

The third way is to determine the AirPods serial number using another Apple device. To do this, connect the AirPods to your iPhone and open the settings. Go to the “Bluetooth” section to see connected devices. Select your AirPods. In the information section, you will locate the AirPods serial number. 

![Image 8: AirPods 3](https://imeicheck.net/images/brands/AirPods/airpods-3-d.jpg)

## Check other devices
